name: American Football REAL
author: Poki
description: American Football REAL brings the thrill of the gridiron to your fingertips! Step onto the field where every move counts, and you're the whole team! Throw precision passes to your teammates, guide your players past defenders, and score epic touchdowns. With fast-paced gameplay and intense action, it's time to prove if you've got what it takes to be a true American football star! How to play American Football REAL? Hold and release to throw. Use the joystick to run. Who created American Football REAL? American Football REAL is created by Splax. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play American Football REAL for free? You can play American Football REAL for free on Poki. Can I play American Football REAL on mobile devices and desktop? American Football REAL can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
